uiBuilder.label: D3 Treemap
uiBuilder.description: A configurable treemap rendered with D3.js. Nested rectangles whose AREA encodes value, for hierarchical or flat (optionally grouped) data. Configurable tiling, color-by-group/value/depth, nested-group headers, auto-contrast labels, and click/hover events.

properties.name: data
properties.label: Data · Treemap data
properties.description: Either a HIERARCHY object { name, children: [ { name, children: [ { name, value } ] } ] } (leaves carry value; internal nodes sum their descendants; leaves may carry an optional color), OR a FLAT array [ { label, value, group?, color? } ] (when a group field is present a 2-level tree group->leaf is built; otherwise a single level of tiles). Auto-detected: an array is treated as flat; an object with children is treated as a hierarchy. Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the chart. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the chart title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the chart title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Chart background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Height of the chart in pixels.

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Animate tiles fading/scaling in on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the fade/scale-in animation in milliseconds.

properties.name: animationEasing
properties.label: Display · Animation easing
properties.description: Easing curve for the tile-in animation.

properties.name: animationStagger
properties.label: Animation · Animation stagger (ms)
properties.description: Delay between categories for a cascade grow-in (0 = all bars animate together).

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Base font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for chart text that doesn't have its own family set. Blank = inherit from the page.

properties.name: dropShadow
properties.label: Display · Drop shadow
properties.description: Apply a soft drop shadow to the tiles.

properties.name: shadowColor
properties.label: Display · Shadow color (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Color of the tile drop shadow (supports rgba).

properties.name: shadowBlur
properties.label: Display · Shadow blur (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Blur radius of the drop shadow, in pixels.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Display · Hover highlight
properties.description: Emphasize a tile on mouse-over (brighter fill + outline).

properties.name: hoverDimOthers
properties.label: Display · Dim others on hover
properties.description: Fade the other tiles when hovering one, so the hovered tile stands out.

properties.name: hoverColor
properties.label: Display · Hover color (when hover highlight on)
properties.description: Color a tile turns on hover. Blank = automatically brighten the tile's own color.

properties.name: tileMethod
properties.label: Tiles · Tiling method
properties.description: How D3 subdivides each rectangle. Squarify aims for square-ish tiles (best general choice); Binary splits to balance the tree; Slice-and-dice alternates horizontal/vertical splits (good for ordered data); Resquarify keeps tiles stable across redraws.

properties.name: tilePadding
properties.label: Tiles · Inner padding (px)
properties.description: Gap between sibling tiles, in pixels.

properties.name: tilePaddingTop
properties.label: Tiles · Group header room (px)
properties.description: Extra padding reserved at the top of each parent group to draw its header label. Only meaningful with nested data and group headers on.

properties.name: tileCornerRadius
properties.label: Tiles · Corner radius (px)
properties.description: Rounded corners of each tile, in pixels. 0 = square corners.

properties.name: tileStroke
properties.label: Tiles · Stroke color
properties.description: Border color drawn around each tile. Leave blank for no stroke.

properties.name: tileStrokeWidth
properties.label: Tiles · Stroke width (px)
properties.description: Border thickness around each tile, in pixels. 0 = no stroke.

properties.name: sortTiles
properties.label: Tiles · Sort
properties.description: Order siblings before tiling. None keeps input order; Value desc puts the largest first (typical); Value asc puts the smallest first.

properties.name: maxDepth
properties.label: Tiles · Max depth
properties.description: Flatten the hierarchy beyond this depth (descendants are merged into their ancestor at this level). 0 = show all levels.

properties.name: colorMode
properties.label: Colors · Color mode
properties.description: By group = each top-level group gets a categorical color (leaves inherit, slightly varied). By value = a sequential scale maps each leaf's value to a color. By depth = color by nesting depth. Custom = use each node's own color, falling back to By group.

properties.name: colorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Categorical scheme
properties.description: Categorical D3 scheme used for By group / By depth coloring, or Custom to use the Color palette below.

properties.name: colorPalette
properties.label: Colors · Color palette
properties.description: JSON array of CSS colors used per group/depth when the Categorical scheme is Custom, e.g. ["#2E93fA","#66DA26"].

properties.name: valueColorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Sequential scheme (By value)
properties.description: Sequential color scheme used when Color mode is By value. Maps the smallest value to the lightest color and the largest to the darkest.

properties.name: useSeriesColors
properties.label: Colors · Use node colors
properties.description: Use a leaf/node's own 'color' field when present (overrides the chosen color mode for that node). Falls back to the color mode otherwise.

properties.name: colorScaleType
properties.label: Color scale · Color scale type
properties.description: How values map to colors when Color mode is By value: sequential (single hue ramp), diverging (two hues around a midpoint), or quantize (discrete steps).

properties.name: customColorStart
properties.label: Color scale · Custom start color
properties.description: Low-end color of a custom gradient for By value coloring. Leave blank to use the Sequential scheme above.

properties.name: customColorEnd
properties.label: Color scale · Custom end color
properties.description: High-end color of a custom gradient for By value coloring. Set both start and end to use a custom gradient instead of the Sequential scheme.

properties.name: reverseColors
properties.label: Color scale · Reverse colors
properties.description: Reverse the direction of the By value color scale.

properties.name: colorMin
properties.label: Color scale · Color domain min
properties.description: Fix the low end of the By value color domain. Leave blank to use the data minimum.

properties.name: colorMax
properties.label: Color scale · Color domain max
properties.description: Fix the high end of the By value color domain. Leave blank to use the data maximum.

properties.name: divergingMidpoint
properties.label: Color scale · Diverging midpoint
properties.description: Midpoint value for the diverging scale. Leave blank to use the data mean.

properties.name: quantizeSteps
properties.label: Color scale · Quantize steps
properties.description: Number of discrete color steps when the scale type is 'quantize'.

properties.name: colorLegendTitle
properties.label: Color legend · Title
properties.description: Optional title shown next to the value color legend. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: colorLegendFormat
properties.label: Color legend · Tick format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for the value color legend ticks (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".0%", ".2s"). Blank = default.

properties.name: showGroupHeaders
properties.label: Labels · Show group headers
properties.description: Draw the parent group names as headers in the reserved top padding of each group. Only meaningful with nested data.

properties.name: groupHeaderFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Group header font size
properties.description: Font size (px) of the parent group header labels.

properties.name: groupHeaderColor
properties.label: Labels · Group header color
properties.description: Text color of the parent group header labels.

properties.name: labelMode
properties.label: Labels · Tile label mode
properties.description: What to draw inside each leaf tile: None, Name only, Name + value, or Value only.

properties.name: labelFormat
properties.label: Labels · Value format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for tile/header values (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".0%", ".2s"). Blank = default.

properties.name: labelFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Tile font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the tile labels.

properties.name: labelColor
properties.label: Labels · Tile text color
properties.description: Text color for the tile labels. Leave blank to auto-pick black or white per tile for best contrast against the tile fill.

properties.name: labelMinTileSize
properties.label: Labels · Hide below tile size (px)
properties.description: Hide labels on tiles narrower or shorter than this many pixels, to avoid clutter on tiny tiles.

properties.name: showLegend
properties.label: Legend · Show legend
properties.description: Show a legend of top-level group names with color swatches.

properties.name: legendPosition
properties.label: Legend · Position
properties.description: Where to place the legend.

properties.name: legendFontSize
properties.label: Legend · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the legend text.

properties.name: legendInteractive
properties.label: Legend · Clickable to toggle categories
properties.description: Let viewers click a group legend item to hide/show that category's tiles; the treemap rescales to the remaining categories. Hidden items stay in the legend (dimmed) so they can be toggled back.

properties.name: showColorLegend
properties.label: Legend · Show color legend
properties.description: Show a gradient color legend for the value-to-color scale (only shown when Color mode is By value).

properties.name: colorLegendPosition
properties.label: Legend · Color legend position
properties.description: Where to place the value color legend.

properties.name: colorLegendTitlePosition
properties.label: Legend · Legend title position
properties.description: Where the optional legend title sits relative to the value color legend. Top/Bottom apply when the legend is on the bottom; Left/Right apply when it is on the right.

properties.name: colorLegendMargin
properties.label: Legend · Color legend margin (px)
properties.description: Gap (px) between the treemap and the value color legend. Applies below the treemap when the legend is on the bottom, and to the right of the treemap when it is on the right.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a hover tooltip.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Template
properties.description: Tooltip content (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {name}, {value}, {formattedValue}, {group}, {path} (ancestors joined by ' / '), {depth}, {percent} (of total), {swatch} (a colored dot matching the tile), {color}, and any custom key on the node. Interpolated values are HTML-escaped.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the pointer. Turn off to anchor it near the hovered tile. Either way it's clamped within the chart bounds.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background color
properties.description: Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks anywhere on the chart (not on a specific tile).

payload.name: tileCount
payload.label: Number of tiles
payload.description: How many leaf tiles are currently rendered.

actions.name: TILE_CLICKED
actions.label: Tile clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks an individual tile. Use to drill into details for that tile.

payload.name: path
payload.label: Path
payload.description: Ancestor names from the root joined by ' / '.

payload.name: group
payload.label: Group
payload.description: Top-level group name the tile belongs to (blank for ungrouped flat data).

payload.name: depth
payload.label: Depth
payload.description: Zero-based nesting depth of the tile.

payload.name: color
payload.label: Color
payload.description: Resolved fill color of the tile.

actions.name: TILE_HOVERED
actions.label: Tile hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a tile. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.

payload.name: group
payload.label: Group
payload.description: Top-level group name the tile belongs to.
